title: Dark Mode Enhancements for Navigation, Object Selector, and Info Icons
story: As a DataTools Pro user with dark mode enabled, I want the navigation, object selector, header, and info icons to properly respect my chosen color scheme, so that the dark mode experience is consistent across all UI components.
description:
Several UI components did not properly adapt to dark mode and the custom primary color. This ticket addresses those gaps.

## Changes
1. **Object selector**: Apply dark background to the object selector widget with the user's selected primary color for highlights
2. **Navigation component**: Enable full dark mode support for the sidebar navigation
3. **Header**: Apply dark mode color `#111c42` to the header bar
4. **Info icons**: Info icons throughout the app were hardcoded green. Changed to respect the user's selected primary/highlight color (e.g., blue when the user selects blue)
5. **Object name pills**: Text color in object selection pills updated to use the primary color instead of hardcoded green
acceptance_criteria: Object selector widget displays with dark background in dark mode
Object selector highlights use the user's selected primary color
Navigation sidebar fully supports dark mode styling
Header bar uses #111c42 background color in dark mode
Info icons use the user's selected primary color instead of hardcoded green
Object name pills in the selector use the primary color for text
Select Objects button uses the primary color
ux_changes: Extended dark mode support to navigation, object selector, header (using #111c42), and info icons. Replaced hardcoded green with dynamic primary color on info icons and object selector pills/buttons.
implementation_notes: Info icons and object selector pills had hardcoded green colors that needed to be replaced with CSS variable references to the user's primary color. Header dark mode color set to #111c42. Object selector background adjusted for dark mode contrast.
comment_summary: Developer pushed initial dark mode fixes to staging. Product owner identified that object name pills and the select objects button were still green instead of the primary color. Developer fixed and redeployed.
